_meta.note: One PASS entry per bot-blocked booking URL. Viator data via Viator MCP connector (live structured ratings/reviews) plus live Chrome page renders; GetYourGuide and TripAdvisor via live Chrome page renders; amtrak.com and omio.com via site: search inspection + content.amtrak.com timetable fetch.

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Ben.method: Viator MCP structured data (4.7, 8,516 reviews) + live Chrome render (meeting point 102 Cherry St, 1 hr)

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Int.method: Viator MCP structured data (4.97, 194 reviews, 2 hr 30 min) + live Chrome render (meeting point 100 Yesler Way, Pioneer Building) + TripAdvisor product page live render (max 15 per group, 10:00 AM start)

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Sno.method: Viator MCP structured data (4.9, 1,366 reviews) + live Chrome render (meet 97 Pike St by 9:45am, minivan small-group)

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Mt-.method: Viator MCP structured data (4.8, 3,325 reviews) + live Chrome render (operating hours 7:20am, hotel pickup); mini-coach per toursnorthwest.com

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/3-H.method: Viator MCP structured data (4.8, 761 reviews) + live Chrome render (operating hours 9:25am, hotel pickup, 14-24 passenger mini bus)

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Str.method: Viator MCP structured data (Smith Tower Observatory Admission Ticket, 4.2, 139 reviews)

https://www.viator.com/tours/Seattle/Sea.method: site: search snippet inspection — product URL with ID 5929GEN, 4.3, 529 reviews, two independent queries

https://www.getyourguide.com/seattle-l19.method: live Chrome page render — 4.8/5, 644 reviews, 1 hr, limited to 10, Pier 55, first departure 10:45am via availability widget
live Chrome page render — 4.6/5, 444 reviews, 4.5 hr, 8:45am, meet 808 Howell St
live Chrome page render — 4.7/5, 467 reviews, 3 hr, 9:30am, meet MoPOP 325 5th Ave N

https://www.tripadvisor.com/AttractionPr.method: live Chrome page render — 5.0, 735 reviews, 3 hr, hotel pickup, limited to 22; start 1:00pm from operator site seattlesbesttours.com

https://www.amtrak.com/cascades-train.method: site: search inspection + live fetch of content.amtrak.com Cascades timetable PDF (amtrak.com is Akamai bot-blocked)

https://www.omio.com/companies/trains/am.method: site: search snippet inspection — omio.com 403s automated fetch; Amtrak carrier page confirmed in live results
